title: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: A classic pasta dish with rich tomato and beef sauce.
steps: Boil the spaghetti according to package instructions.
Saute onion and garlic until soft, then add minced beef and cook until browned.
Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, and oregano and simmer for 25 minutes.
Serve the sauce over the spaghetti.
notes: Top with grated parmesan if available.

title: Chicken Karahi
description: A bold tomato-based chicken curry cooked with fresh ginger and green chilies.
steps: Cook chicken with oil and ginger garlic paste until lightly browned.
Add tomatoes, spices, and chilies, then cook until the tomatoes break down.
Simmer until oil separates and the chicken is fully cooked.
Finish with coriander and julienned ginger.

title: Vegetable Fried Rice
description: Quick stir-fried rice with mixed vegetables and soy sauce.
steps: Scramble the eggs in a wok and set aside.
Stir-fry vegetables briefly, then add rice and soy sauce.
Mix in the eggs and spring onions.
Finish with sesame oil before serving.
notes: Use cold rice for the best texture.

title: Chocolate Mug Cake
description: A fast one-mug chocolate cake ready in minutes.
steps: Mix all ingredients in a microwave-safe mug until smooth.
Microwave for 60 to 90 seconds until set.
notes: Add chocolate chips for extra richness.
